response.justification: Bogdan has an impressive and extensive background in software engineering, particularly with Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, along with a strong commitment to software craftsmanship and agile practices. However, this role requires deep, hands-on expertise in C++, STL, and industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443). Since his only professional experience with C++ was a brief six-month role nearly a decade ago, he does not meet the core technical requirements for this specific C++ focused architecture and development position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience with a strong grasp of full-stack development and modern cloud technologies.
Proven track record of technical leadership, mentorship, and promoting software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing).
Possesses advantageous skills mentioned in the job description, including Node.js, React, and distributed systems.
concerns: Severely lacks the required extensive, recent professional experience in C++, STL, and object-oriented C++ architecture.
No demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards such as IEC 62443 or specific Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Missing background in industrial automation machinery and related protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA).
